user.title: Wiren Board
user.description: Connect to the Wiren Board MQTT broker.

pick_controls.title: Discovered devices
pick_controls.description: Select Wiren Board controls to create in Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Wiren Board MQTT broker.
error.no_devices_found: No devices found. Check MQTT and the topic prefix.

controls.title: Wiren Board controls
controls.description: Update the controls that should be created in Home Assistant.

add_group.title: Home Assistant device group
add_group.description: Create a logical Home Assistant device from controls that belong to different Wiren Board devices. Reuse an existing ID to update that group.

add_group_roles.title: Control roles
add_group_roles.description: Select only the roles needed by the composite entity. Controls in "Expose as separate entities" will also appear as regular sensor/binary_sensor/button/number entities.

edit_group.title: Edit group
edit_group.description: Choose the group you want to edit.

edit_group_details.title: Group contents
edit_group_details.description: Change the Home Assistant device name and contents. Controls that already belong to another group are marked with that group name in square brackets.

edit_group_roles.title: Control roles
edit_group_roles.description: Select only the roles needed by the composite entity. Controls in "Expose as separate entities" will also appear as regular sensor/binary_sensor/button/number entities.

remove_group.title: Remove group
remove_group.description: Remove a grouping. Entities will stay selected and return to their original Wiren Board devices.

diagnostics.title: Wiren Board diagnostics

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Wiren Board MQTT broker.
error.already_exists: A group with this ID already exists.
error.no_groups: No groups have been created yet.
